title: Asha Bhosle: A Famous Singer from Bollywood
summary: Asha Bhosle was a very famous singer from Bollywood, which is the Indian movie industry. She sang many songs for movies over 80 years, more than 12,000 songs! She had a special voice that made people happy and dance. She died at age 92 in Mumbai, India, after a heart attack. Many people are sad and sharing nice words about her online. The Prime Minister of India and other stars said she was an important voice that touched hearts around the world. Her songs are loved by generations and will always be remembered.

background_read: Asha Bhosle was a legendary singer from India who sang for Bollywood movies. Bollywood is like Hollywood but in India, making lots of films with music and dance. She started singing a long time ago and became very popular because her voice made people feel happy and want to dance. She worked for over 80 years, which is almost a whole lifetime! When she died, many famous people and fans said kind things about her, showing how much she was loved. Her songs are still played today and remind people of good times.
Article_Structure: WHO: Asha Bhosle, a famous Bollywood singer
WHAT: She died at age 92 after a heart attack, and people are sharing tributes
WHERE: She died in Mumbai, India
WHY: Her death marks the end of an era because she sang many songs that made generations happy

perspectives.description: Asha Bhosle is seen as a big star in Indian culture because her music touched many people's lives.
